steps.title: Identify the present role
steps.content: The previous sentence identifies the Old Manse as the house where Hawthorne once lived. The underlined sentence begins with "Now" and says the house is a museum connected to Hawthorne and other literary figures, shifting from past association to current function.

steps.title: Reject author-focused roles
steps.content: Choice A is wrong because the sentence does not summarize Hawthorne's career. Choice C is wrong because it recommends no works. Choice D overstates the sentence as recounting history, even though it mainly states what the house is used for now. The answer is B.
